hero.title: Be More Productive with MongoDB & Prisma
hero.description: Bring your developer experience to the next level. Prisma makes it easier than ever to work with your MongoDB database and enables you to query data with confidence.

cards.title: Intuitive Data Modeling
cards.description: The Prisma schema uses an intuitive modeling language that is easy to read and understand for every team member.

cards.title: High Productivity & Confidence
cards.description: Prisma has an intuitive querying API with auto-completion so that you can find the right queries directly in your editor.

cards.title: Ensured Data Consistency
cards.description: Prisma’s schema-aware database client ensures that you never bring your data in an inconsistent state.

cards.title: Fantastic DX
cards.description: Prisma is well-known for its outstanding developer experience and is loved by developers around the world for it.

cards.title: First-Class Type-Safety
cards.description: Prisma provides strong type-safety when used with TypeScript, even for relations and partial queries.

cards.title: Huge Community & Support
cards.description: Prisma has a huge Discord community, regularly hosts events and provides helpful support via GitHub.

how.title: How Prisma and MongoDB fit together
how.description: MongoDB is a powerful NoSQL database that allows developers to intuitively work with their data. However, due to its schemaless nature, developers may run into data inconsistencies as they're evolving their applications. Prisma is a next-generation ORM/ODM that makes it easier to ensure data consistency by providing an easy-to-read schema and a type-safe database client with auto-completion for all queries.

body.content:
Reading data in MongoDB with Prisma Client

Prisma Client provides a powerful API for reading data in MongoDB, including filters, pagination, ordering and relational queries for embedded documents and reference-based relations.

Creating data in MongoDB with Prisma Client

Prisma Client gives you a rich experience when creating data in MongoDB, allowing you to build complex data structures and relations using an intuitive API.

Updating data in MongoDB with Prisma Client

Prisma Client enables you to update and manage your data in MongoDB with ease, providing a rich set of features allowing you to handle complex updates.

Deleting data in MongoDB with Prisma Client

Deleting data from your MongoDB is made easy with Prisma Client's API. The Prisma schema additionally allows you to configure referential actions to provide referential integrity in your data as documents are deleted.

Modeling data in MongoDB with Prisma schema

The Prisma schema allows you to define the shape of the data in your collections, set up relations, and create embedded documents within your collections in a way that is easy to understand.

quote.text: We believe that the combination of MongoDB Atlas Serverless and Prisma Accelerate will greatly simplify the process of building and deploying serverless applications in the cloud, especially for workloads that need to scale to high connection counts.

cards.title: Using Prisma with MongoDB
cards.description: In this guide, you will learn about the concepts behind using Prisma and MongoDB, the commonalities and differences between MongoDB and other database providers, and the process for configuring your application to integrate with MongoDB using Prisma.

cards.title: MongoDB in the Data Guide
cards.description: Learn how to use MongoDB to its fullest to take advantage of the performance and features that developers have grown to rely on.

cards.title: Watch
cards.description: In this episode of What's New in Prisma, Matt takes you through a demo of the embedded document support in MongoDB.
